headline: United Airlines Beats Earnings Estimates but Lowers Guidance Due to Oil Prices
summary: For the full year, United changed its profit guidance range to $7-$11 a share, compared with its previous earnings guidance of $12 to $14 a share.

headline: United Tops Views, Plans To Cut Capacity Amid Fuel Price Surge. Alaska Air Earnings Mixed.
summary: United Airlines clears Q1 expectations amid fuel price surge, but plans to cut capacity. Alaska Air posts mixed results, pulls outlook.

headline: Southwest (LUV) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Robert Jordan: Thank you, Danielle, and good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining our earnings call today.  The fourth quarter capped a year of meaningful transformation and accelerated execution at Southwest.

headline: US seeks $10 billion for next phase of air traffic control overhaul
summary: U.S. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy wants $10 billion from Congress for the next phase of a massive effort to modernize America's aging air traffic control system and reduce systemic flight...

headline: United Airlines Earnings Land Next. Merger Talk, Fuel Costs, Airfares, and More to Watch.
summary: United Airlines  investors saw one flight path to growth closed off as  American Airlines  categorically snubbed its merger pitch last week.  The stock has been in recovery mode, up more than 7% this month but subject to the whims of volatile oil markets and elevated jet fuel prices brought on by the Iran war.  United shares are down about 12% in 2026, lagging behind rival  Delta Air Lines  up 2.6%, and  Southwest Airlines  up 1.2%.

headline: Southwest Ties New Digital Leadership And Perks To Lofty LUV Valuation
summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) appoints Sabrina Callahan as its first Chief Digital and Marketing Officer. The airline launches Sip and Ship, a program that lets customers check a case of wine at no extra charge from select airports. Route expansion continues into key markets, reflecting a focus on customer programs alongside network growth. Southwest Airlines operates as a major U.S. low cost carrier, competing on frequency, customer service, and fare structure across its domestic and near...
